response.overview: # Translation  The meeting between Nabila Aulia or Bella (Nabila Razali) and Tengku Aisy Mateen (Aedy Ashraf) begins with an incident of quarrel over a Lily flower at a flower shop. Bella stops working at a hotel and returns to her village. Tengku Aisy decides to take over his father's hotel after overhearing a conversation between Zhafran (Syazuwan Hassan) and his stepmother, Tengku Lydia (Emelda Rosemila) who want to take all of his father's hotel shares. This decision leads to a reunion between Aisy and Bella, who is now managing her family's resort in the village, Vila Paksina. Zhafran introduces Dahlia (Puteri Khareeza) to his adoptive mother, Tengku Lydia, but Dahlia is insulted by Tengku Lydia. Zhafran, influenced by Tengku Lydia's words, begins to pursue Bella's love and abandons Dahlia. Tengku Aisy's arrival has attracted Dahlia's attention. Dahlia tries to charm Tengku Aisy, but Tengku Aisy has proposed to Bella as his wife.
response.title: Kerana Cinta Itu Ada
